'''''Blast Radius''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] belonging to the [[Viraxo]]. ''Blast Radius'', along with the [[Victory II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Furious (Victory II-class)|''Furious'']], arrived at the [[Twin Suns Station (space station)|Twin Sun Station]] to capture it.

{{Ship-stub}}
